summary: A Go-based modular testing framework that detects conditions, runs assertions, and reports results with plugin and Kubernetes support.
concerns: untracked file in git status indicates possible incomplete commit or ignored artifact
heavy reliance on test files as key files suggests core logic may lack documentation
scattered config directories (.claude/, .gorchestra/, GOrchestra/) could lead to configuration fragmentation
suggestions: consolidate configuration directories into a single standard location
add inline documentation to core logic files to reduce dependency on tests for understanding
investigate and resolve the untracked file to maintain a clean repository state
